objective: Complete WS-02 source and CI boundaries for streaming Hermes-derived Web, MCP Apps, AG-UI, remote MCP authorization, connector custody, and effective capability truth without allowing presentation or runtime surfaces to manufacture Manager authority.
success_criteria: Hermes text and activity stream without avoidable Manager buffering; consequential execution remains Manager-authorized.
Remote MCP metadata, audience, PKCE, state, redirect, token custody, and staleness fail closed.
MCP Apps use opaque-origin sandboxing and current WorkAction mediation.
AG-UI events are versioned, ordered, replayable role-safe projection; client actions become authorized commands.
Effective capability requires fresh runtime, dependency, credential, network, policy, entitlement, connector, probe, and authority-version evidence.
Exact-head Standard, broad, source, build, Hermes, archaeology, and compiled browser gates pass.
forbidden_files: Hermes image pin or upstream source
mitigations: Connector-native contents writes create one commit per file; the final PR is squash-merged. Live external acceptance remains explicitly open.
